member.name: T:sunday_school_ms.My.MyWebExtension
member.summary: Module used to define the properties that are available in the My Namespace for Web projects.

member.name: P:sunday_school_ms.My.MyWebExtension.Computer
member.summary: Returns information about the host computer.

member.name: P:sunday_school_ms.My.MyWebExtension.User
member.summary: Returns information for the current Web user.

member.name: M:sunday_school_ms.AutoGenerate.NextID(System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Data.SqlClient.SqlTransaction)
member.summary: Generate next ID for a table with a prefix and numeric sequence
member.param: Table to check for existing IDs
Number of digits for numeric part, e.g. 2 → SL-01

member.name: M:sunday_school_ms.DbHelper.GetConnectionString
member.summary: Always return the local SQL Server connection string.
